'''hahovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixodiasis|ixodiasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixodiasis|ixodiasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hahovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæheveth|hæheveth]] || [[word:hæhevej|hæhevej]] || [[word:hæhevesh|hæhevesh]] || [[word:hæheve|hæheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahohovoth|hahohovoth]] || [[word:hahohovoj|hahohovoj]] || [[word:hahohovosh|hahohovosh]] || [[word:hahohovo|hahohovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahovoth|hahovoth]] || [[word:hahovoj|hahovoj]] || [[word:hahovosh|hahovosh]] || [[word:hahovo|hahovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahofvoth|hahofvoth]] || [[word:hahofvoj|hahofvoj]] || [[word:hahofvosh|hahofvosh]] || [[word:hahofvof|hahofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahovotho|hahovotho]] || [[word:hahovojo|hahovojo]] || [[word:hahovosho|hahovosho]] || [[word:hahovoko|hahovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahovoth|hahovoth]] || [[word:hahovoj|hahovoj]] || [[word:hahovosh|hahovosh]] || [[word:hahovo|hahovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahovothol|hahovothol]] || [[word:hahovojol|hahovojol]] || [[word:hahovoshol|hahovoshol]] || [[word:hahovokol|hahovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahovothotho|hahovothotho]] || [[word:hahovojojo|hahovojojo]] || [[word:hahovoshosho|hahovoshosho]] || [[word:hahovoko|hahovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahovothon|hahovothon]] || [[word:hahovojon|hahovojon]] || [[word:hahovoshon|hahovoshon]] || [[word:hahovokon|hahovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahovothoro|hahovothoro]] || [[word:hahovojoro|hahovojoro]] || [[word:hahovoshoro|hahovoshoro]] || [[word:hahovokoro|hahovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
